# Commonweave

> An open framework for a regenerative global economy. Maps 27,000+ candidate civil-society organizations across 88 countries, scored against an alignment framework, and published as CC0 open data.

## What it is
Commonweave is an open-source directory and framework. It identifies, scores, and maps organizations working on the transition to a regenerative economy: sustainability, mutual aid, cooperatives, commons-based governance, and adjacent fields. The data is public-domain (CC0) and runs on a multilingual bot pipeline across ~30 languages.

## Who runs it
Maintained by Simon L. Paige and contributors. Open contribution welcome.

## What you can do here
- **Browse the directory**: search 24,500+ aligned organizations across 60+ countries.
- **Explore the map**: see the geographic distribution.
- **Read the framework**: governance models and evidence-based pathways toward ecological and social balance.

## Important pages
- [Home](https://commonweave.earth/): framework overview
- [Directory](https://commonweave.earth/directory.html): searchable org list
- [Map](https://commonweave.earth/map.html): geographic view
- [Doc](https://commonweave.earth/doc.html): framework writeup

## Data license
CC0 - public domain. Use it however you want.

## Contact
- Repo: github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave
